'''Yrrcanna''' was a black furred [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] who participated in fights in the [[Dool Arena]] of the [[The Broken Tusk (Reuss VIII)|The Broken Tusk]] on [[Reuss VIII/Legends|Reuss VIII]]. He was a former [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] who retained a moody and violent nature following his freedom.

==Biography==
Yrrcanna went from being a [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] to a top ranked contender in the [[Dool Arena]]. He was a crowd favorite and one of the few contenders who had a real chance of dethroning the reigning champion, [[Tull Raine]].

==Personality and traits==
Yrrcanna had aggressive impulses and was prone to entering fits of berserker rage. This proved to be a valuable asset in the arena, however, and he used his ferocity to rise through the ranks.

He had black fur but often wore gold glow-paint that depicted ancient clan markings to both intimidate his opponents and pay homage to his ancestors.

==Skills and abilities==
As expected of a Wookiee pit fighter, Yrrcanna was very skilled with his fists. Unlike other contenders he did not rely on [[Melee weapon/Legends|melee weapons]] and instead relied on his brute strength to win matches. He was also a smart fighter being able to both parry and dodge with great agility. He was also skilled with a [[Bowcaster/Legends|bowcaster]] although he never was able to use it in the arena.

==Behind the scenes==
Yrrcanna was designed by [[Paul Danner]] and [[Bill Smith]] for ''[[Wretched Hives of Scum & Villainy]]'', a supplement for the ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' that was published by [[West End Games]] in [[1997]].

Although the image depicted him with some form of blade, neither his equipment list nor bio mentioned ever using a blade in the arena.
